items.author: Ankit Kumar
items.text: Visited Yo China in Modinagar recently and had a pretty good experience. The food was fresh and came out quickly. I tried the noodles and momos, and both tasted really good, especially the momos with their spicy chutney. The place is simple but comfortable.

items.author: Akshit Verma
items.text: Amazing place to chill out. My most favourite dishes are kurkure momos and pizza in Yo China — loved it. Services are really good and they always ask for feedback — "kaisa laga apko" "all good?" This gesture is really sweet.

items.author: Shivani Singh
items.text: I have been ordering from your restaurant for a long time, and I never expected this. Today, I found a hair in my pasta, which is completely unacceptable. This is very disappointing, and I hope you take this matter seriously and ensure proper hygiene in the future.

items.author: Google Reviewer
items.text: Amazing food, great service, the ambience of the restaurant is also good. Perfect spot for a quick Chinese fix in Modinagar.

items.author: Google Reviewer
items.text: The atmosphere and vibe of the place is so good. Kurkure momos are a must-try — crispy outside, juicy inside. Will definitely come back.

items.author: Google Reviewer
items.text: Very bad experience. Food is tasteless — money waste. Expected much better given the hype around this place.

items.author: Local Guide
items.text: Yo China Special Noodles are genuinely special — generous portion, good spice level. Delivery was on time and packaging was neat. Solid value for ₹200–400 range.

items.author: Regular Customer
items.text: Best Chinese food in Modinagar hands down. Gravy Manchurian with fried rice is my go-to combo. Staff remembers regulars — feels like home.
